archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for High-End Service

headings.weight_strategy: Radical weight contrast (Black vs Light). Do not use Inter.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24, py-32 for sections.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room / Swiss Grid hybrid. Avoid symmetric boring cards. Use varied span ratios for the services bento grid (e.g., col-span-2 for primary services, col-span-1 for secondary).

surface_strategy.cards: Solid background (#FFFFFF), sharp 1px borders (border-border_subtle), no shadow by default, subtle shadow-lg and -translate-y-1 on hover.
surface_strategy.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px subtle bottom border. z-50 sticky.
surface_strategy.emergency_banner: Retro-Futurism/Terminal look: Deep black/navy background (#0A1128), neon accent text (#00A3FF).

buttons.primary: bg-primary_brand text-white hover:bg-accent_electric transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary_brand border border-primary_brand hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold
buttons.accent: bg-accent_electric text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold

components.hero_overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A1128]/90 via-[#0A1128]/60 to-transparent for text readability while letting the image breathe.
components.testimonials: Editorial feel. Use large font-light for the quote, high contrast, immense negative space.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized inputs. Square corners, 1px border, focus:ring-accent_electric.

motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have transition-transform or transition-colors.
motion.scroll_animations: Use staggered fade-up for grid items. Subtle parallax on hero image.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react for standard icons. Consider @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone feel if needed.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

hero_background.description: High-quality close-up of plumber's hands installing steel pipes. Use as the main hero background with the specified dark navy gradient overlay.

about_section.description: Portrait of a mature male worker leaning against a wall, representing the veteran/family-owned trustworthy plumber.

service_water_heater.description: Man fixing a water heater in a room. Use in the services grid.

service_fixtures.description: Luxury modern bathroom with marble and a bathtub. Use to showcase fixture installation service.

emergency_banner_bg.description: Abstract dark water and rocks. Use as a background texture for the 24/7 Emergency banner.

trust_badges.description: Marshall brand logo. Use as a dummy sponsor/partner logo in the trust badges section (apply grayscale/opacity).
Mercedes emblem. Use as a dummy sponsor/partner logo in the trust badges section (apply grayscale/opacity).
Coca-cola logo. Use as a dummy sponsor/partner logo in the trust badges section (apply grayscale/opacity filter to make it look like a unified partner row).

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif for headings. Use Clash Display or a similar premium architectural font from Google Fonts (e.g., Cabinet Grotesk, Syne is banned, so stick to Outfit or Space Grotesk if Clash isn't available, or inject Clash Display via CDN).
Ensure the design does not look like a generic SaaS site. This is a premium home service company.
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' header. It must float above the content with a high backdrop-blur and a 1px subtle bottom border.

For the hero section, do not use a flat blanket black overlay. Use the specified gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A1128]/90 via-[#0A1128]/60 to-transparent) so the image is visible on the right side.
Use generous padding. Standard sections should be py-24 or py-32.
Implement a bento-style grid for the 'Services' section. Mix col-span-1 and col-span-2 to create asymmetry. Avoid perfectly uniform squares.
The 24/7 Emergency Banner should be highly contrasting. Deep navy (#0A1128) with Electric Cerulean (#00A3FF) highlights.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and major sections.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural marketing layouts. Only use Shadcn for forms or complex interactive pieces.
Never use placeholder image services. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the image_urls section.
